name: PolyAccel-v1
description: Polynomial-accelerated power iteration using Chebyshev-like T_2 polynomial. degree=2, freq=3.
author: GLM-5
result: Polynomial-accelerated power iteration using Chebyshev-like T_2 polynomial. Applies Y = scale*AAB - B where AAB = A*(A*B). The polynomial T_2(A) = 2A^2 - I accelerates convergence compared to standard power iteration. Key insight: polynomial acceleration provides faster convergence per iteration, allowing freq=3 with good explained variance.
